description: End-to-end cua loop smoke for Phase 3 (issue #1867). Each task drives the perceive-decide-act loop with a deterministic mock LLM and asserts the final outcome plus the perception strategy. Headless, runs in CI.

tasks.title: Find file
tasks.goal: Find the file 'README.md' inside the focused window.

tasks.title: Click button
tasks.goal: Click the OK button in the active dialog.

tasks.title: Screenshot region
tasks.goal: Capture a screenshot of the desktop and report the path.

tasks.title: Count items
tasks.goal: Count the visible buttons in the focused window's accessibility tree.

tasks.title: Type into field
tasks.goal: Type 'hello world' into the focused text field.

tasks.title: Dismiss dialog
tasks.goal: Press Escape to dismiss the open dialog.
